word: H5887 - עֵין תַּפּוּחַ - ʻÊyn Tappûwach - ane tap-poo'-akh - En-tappuah

sections.paragraph:
Original: עין תּפּוּח

Transliteration: ‛êyn tapûach

Phonetic: ane tap-poo'-akh

BDB Definition:

En-tappuah = "fountain of the apple-city"
  1. a place on the border between Ephraim and Manasseh

Origin: from H5869 and H8598

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
